name: 金融数学（复利/年金）
subject: math
domain_name: 数与代数 / Number & Algebra / Number & Algebra
curriculum_points: Solve problems in financial mathematics involving compound interest, annuities, amortization, and depreciation using appropriate technology (AO3).
Interpret and calculate the real purchasing power of money, considering inflation, in financial decision-making.
